title: Vedanta is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Vedanta is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Vedanta is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Pimpri-Chinchwad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Vedanta:
Vedanta is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vedanta!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
